title: Google Hotels Search Scraper
description: Search Google Hotels by destination with dates, guests, price filters, rating filters, hotel class, amenities, and pagination.

q.title: Destination or Hotel Query
q.description: Location, landmark, area, or hotel query to search in Google Hotels.

check_in_date.title: Check-in Date
check_in_date.description: Check-in date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be today or a future date.

check_out_date.title: Check-out Date
check_out_date.description: Check-out date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be after the check-in date.

children.title: Children
children.description: Number of children. If greater than 0, provide matching Children Ages.

children_ages.title: Children Ages
children_ages.description: Ages for each child, 1-17. The number of ages must match Children.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Three-letter currency code such as USD, EUR, or GBP.

gl.title: Country
gl.description: Two-letter Google country code such as us, fr, gb, or de.

hl.title: Language
hl.description: Two-letter language code such as en, fr, de, or es.

sort_by.title: Sort By
sort_by.description: Google Hotels sort mode: 3 for lowest price, 8 for highest rating, 13 for most reviewed.

max_price.title: Maximum Price
max_price.description: Maximum nightly price. Must be greater than Minimum Price and within 5000.

rating.title: Minimum Rating
rating.description: Google Hotels minimum rating filter: 7 means 3.5+, 8 means 4.0+, 9 means 4.5+.

free_cancellation.title: Free Cancellation
free_cancellation.description: Return only properties with free cancellation. Cannot be combined with price, class, rating, amenities, property type, or brand filters.

vacation_rentals.title: Vacation Rentals
vacation_rentals.description: Search vacation rentals instead of hotels.

eco_certified.title: Eco Certified
eco_certified.description: Return only eco-certified hotels. Cannot be combined with other non-boolean filters.

special_offers.title: Special Offers
special_offers.description: Return only properties with special offers. Cannot be combined with other non-boolean filters.

bedrooms.title: Bedrooms
bedrooms.description: Minimum bedrooms for vacation rental searches.

bathrooms.title: Bathrooms
bathrooms.description: Minimum bathrooms for vacation rental searches.

next_page_token.title: Next Page Token
next_page_token.description: Pagination token returned by a previous Google Hotels search response.

property_token.title: Property Token
property_token.description: Specific Google Hotels property token, often returned by Google Hotels autocomplete.
